content: Self-Refine and Reflexion can be combined into a two-layer autonomous improvement framework where Self-Refine’s task-specific iterative output polishing acts as the working-level improvement cycle, while Reflexion’s long-term dynamic memory of past reflections accumulates generalized lessons to accelerate future Self-Refine iterations across different tasks. This creates a autonomous improvement system that retains the core advantage of both methods—no extra supervised training or external data is required.
